title: Support - App, user is logged during install process, correct data
scenario: Support screen in hamburger menu displays correct app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection info after onboarding login
steps: 1. Install the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Launch the app and complete the onboarding flow by logging in with valid credentials.
3. Tap the hamburger menu (☰) icon in the top-left corner of the Home screen.
5. On the Support screen, locate the "App" section.

6. Verify the following fields are displayed and contain correct data:
   - App version
   - Tenant name
   - Tenant ID
   - User ID
   - App ID
   - Last connection info
expected: The App section under Support displays all six fields (App version, Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, Last connection info) with accurate data matching the logged-in account and app installation.
